column1: Hey Christina, thanks for your interest in traveling with Go Blue Tours. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text shortly with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from Go Blue here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
Hi...we are off from the 9th to the 15th.
And side note. I am the mom researching for the girls.
Got it, appreciate the context, happy to help!
how many ppl in the group?
perfect. and which school are they all from
I'll put this info together now so you can show the group. how soon were they looking to get things booked?
perfect. is it okay if I send most of it through email? its a little long for text
got it. will send over now
was there a specific destination you wanted to look at?
They are open, but some of the parents have concerns about Mexico. I would start with the Bahamas
no prob. and how about Punta Cana DR?
We as a family are going there in January, so would like to leave that as a last option.
got it. just sent that over lmk if you got it
Yes, I got it! We will take a look and get back to you. Thank you so much.
heyy Christina whats up, how we feelin about those options so far?
I just sent the group flights and the Bahama options. Looks good, just need to get everyone on board.
perff, def wanna get those locked in before pricing goes up
is there a couple of you that are 100% locked in on the trip?
hey checkin in, how we lookin with getting people on board?
heyy Christina whats up, any update on the squad?
Getting there. They are now leaning towards the DR
okay dope. yea thats where I'll be too
Lmk when yall are ready things are starting to get slim
We are ready. What is the next step
Sounds good, I'll get the reservation started now so they can each slot in and secure. Did we want to do the 4 night or 5 night?
A lot of ppl do come in the 7th. That saturday
Can they do the 7th to the 11th
Yea absolutely. Will send that over in a sec
Here's the reservation for ya. Will send it in an email as well
hey christina! were they all able to get onto the reservation okay?
hey morning! we'll want to have the girls deposit on the reservation before it expires today. are we able to have them get those in?
Starting a group chat with the 4 of them and will put the pressure on.
Hey! I just messaged you from Bella's email. I don't see where I sign into an account.
Hey! Here's the log in link https://secure.springbreaku.com/site/public/sign-in
You can also access it from the reservation itself. There's an "Access Account" button at the top with a profile icon
hey whenever you have a min, if you could have everyone upload their flight info so we can schedule airport transfers
Liked “hey whenever you have a min, if you could have everyone upload their flight info so we can schedule airport transfers”
heyy just waiting on Elizabeth then y'all will be all good!
Hi Spiffy, I will let them know she needs to get on that!
I will send a message to the group. I had no idea she didn't do it. They are all on the same flight, but let me give her another poke.
hey if theyre on the same flight I can add it in on my end here. so she's all set
Awesome and she texted back she would do it after class
So, did you say you will be at the resort during their stay?

Awesome! My daughter Isabella that is going and I were in Punta Cana in January, so I feel like she knows what to expect, but happy to know there is a desk or something they can go to, if they have any questions.
yea we have on site staff its a big part of our program. we'll be there to help her with whatever she needs as soon as she lands
most of our onsite staff members are from DR as well, which helps with communicating with hotel staff
Hi! I just emailed the girls the DR e-ticket link they'll need, and info on where to find our transportation service when they land
Did they want to add any party pass tickets or do the booze cruise event?
Sorry for my delay. Will ask
And is that something they can decide when they get there
yes, Im just not sure what the price or availability will be on site
